channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Chain-of-Thought
channel.description: Latest Chain-of-Thought news in Context Engineering

item.title: LifeBench: A Benchmark for Long-Horizon Multi-Source Memory
item.description: arXiv:2603.03781v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long-term memory is fundamental for personalized agents capable of accumulating knowledge, reasoning over user experiences, and adapting across time. However, existing memory benchmarks primarily target declarative memory, specifically semantic and ep...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> reasoning, context, API, retrieval, memory | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: AOI: Turning Failed Trajectories into Training Signals for Autonomous Cloud Diagnosis
item.description: arXiv:2603.03378v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents offer a promising data-driven approach to automating Site Reliability Engineering (SRE), yet their enterprise deployment is constrained by three challenges: restricted access to proprietary data, unsafe action executi...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> large language model, reasoning, LLM, vision, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: ThinkSound - [NeurIPS 2025] PyTorch implementation of [ThinkSound], a unified framework for generating audio from any modality, guided by Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning.
item.description: [NeurIPS 2025] PyTorch implementation of [ThinkSound], a unified framework for generating audio from any modality, guided by Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> reasoning, CoT, chain-of-thought, framework, audio | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: PageIndex - 📑 PageIndex: Document Index for Vectorless, Reasoning-based RAG

item.title: Cline-Recursive-Chain-of-Thought-System-CRCT- - A framework designed to manage context, dependencies, and tasks in large-scale Cline projects within VS Code
item.description: A framework designed to manage context, dependencies, and tasks in large-scale Cline projects within VS Code<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, context, chain-of-thought | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>

item.title: cosmos-reason1 - Cosmos-Reason1 models understand the physical common sense and generate appropriate embodied decisions in natural language through long chain-of-thought reasoning processes.
item.description: Cosmos-Reason1 models understand the physical common sense and generate appropriate embodied decisions in natural language through long chain-of-thought reasoning processes.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> reasoning, model, chain-of-thought | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
